title: murraya paniculata
intro: Murraya paniculata, also known as Orange Jessamine or Mock Orange, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to the presence of limonene and other essential oils. The health benefits of Murraya paniculata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of digestive issues and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
